title: centaurea litardierei
intro: Centaurea litardierei, also known as mountain bluet, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to the mountainous regions of Turkey and Iran. Traditionally, Centaurea litardierei has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its flavonoid and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Centaurea litardierei include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially aiding in the treatment of certain cancers. Centaurea litardierei can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in folk medicine to support overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
